items.name_en: M58009 Blue Denim! This Mini Pochette Accessoires handbag is made from Monogram Denim cotton fabric, where the Monogram pattern is woven into the material. After bleaching, assembling, and sand washing, the certified cotton achieves a unique texture. It features a rounded silhouette, a zipper opening for ample storage, and can be carried by chain or hook.

items.name_en: M734 Top-tier Original Dynamic Code Chip Blossom Small Tote. Made from soft perforated calfskin, featuring a removable woven leather LV decoration and a perforated LV Circle pattern on the front. Use the handle or the removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap to switch between hand, elbow, shoulder, and crossbody carrying styles.
